entrypoints.name: create_brief
entrypoints.description: Create a daily or on-demand Portfolio Risk Desk brief for a portfolio, watchlist, or set of themes.

entrypoints.name: write_brief_to_notion
entrypoints.description: Return a host-consumable handoff for writing a generated brief into Notion with structured properties and body blocks.

civic: Host-managed least-privilege OAuth and user-scoped access boundary
Constrains what the agent can access or do on behalf of the user
apify: Collection for filings, press releases, earnings pages, investor relations, market news pages, and other public web evidence
redis: Host-managed memory for prior briefs and over-time comparison
Can store normalized notes, change logs, and retrieval continuity metadata
Invoked by the OpenClaw or ClawHub host rather than by this package directly
x: Complementary fast-moving signal source for official accounts, management commentary, and market-adjacent chatter
Can be collected through Apify-backed workflows in the MVP, with direct integration evaluated later
contextual_ai: Optional comparison point for retrieval quality and memory continuity over time
Evaluation path, not a required MVP dependency
notion: Host-managed persistence target for Portfolio Risk Desk brief handoffs
The skill emits the handoff payload and the host performs the API write

guardrails: No trade recommendations or price targets
This is a simplified public-markets research assistant, not an institutional-grade risk model
Facts and interpretations separated in output
Every key point tied to one or more sources
When evidence is weak or conflicting, say so explicitly
Scenario analysis must include an explicit confidence level

run_demo: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m intelligence_desk_brief run-demo --mode happy --output-format both
PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m intelligence_desk_brief run-demo --mode provider_failure --output-format json
PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m intelligence_desk_brief run-demo --mode delivery_failure --output-format json
